Our Story

Not just a shot.
A statement.

Do It Fluid was born from a simple truth — the people who need natural wellness solutions the most are the ones least served by the mainstream market. Too many options hide behind vague language and sterile branding.

We said exactly what it does on the label. Bold. Direct. Unapologetic. Every 2oz bottle is a precision-crafted herbal formula designed to support vitality, circulation, sexual wellness, and full-body function.

The Experience

Make it a ritual.
Not just a shot.

01
Refrigerate
Store cold. Do It Fluid is formulated fresh — refrigerate immediately upon delivery and after opening.
02
Shake
Natural herbal compounds settle. Shake well before opening to ensure full formula potency.
03
Consume
Take the full 2oz shot on its own or mixed with water. For adults 18 and older only.
04
Do It
Allow the formula to work. Results build with consistent use. Let the fluid do what the name says.

Meet the Founder

Ariees
Renea Jackson
A.K.A. RENEA JACKSON
Founder & CEO · Do It Fluid™ · KlimaxxLab™

Ariees — Renea Jackson is not just a founder — she is a force. A real estate investor, entrepreneur, and multi-venture builder who understands what it means to move in rooms that weren't built for you and command them anyway.

Do It Fluid™ was born from her belief that bold people deserve bold solutions. No apologies. No fine print buried in shame. Just real results, premium formulation, and the confidence to say exactly what a product does.
